---
title: "Naver Cloud, Nvidia form AI factory alliance - upi.com"
date: 2026-06-02 22:27:28 +0000
category: news

source_publisher: "Google News · Scale AI"

description: "Naver Cloud and Nvidia have announced a strategic alliance to create an AI factory, enhancing their capabilities in artificial intelligence."
---

Naver Cloud, a prominent cloud service provider, has joined forces with Nvidia, a leader in graphics processing units (GPUs), to form an AI factory alliance. This partnership is significant as it aims to bolster the development and deployment of AI technologies, a critical area of growth in the tech industry. With AI applications becoming increasingly vital across various sectors, this collaboration positions both companies to leverage their strengths in cloud computing and GPU technology.

The AI factory alliance will focus on creating a robust infrastructure for AI development, enabling businesses to harness the power of artificial intelligence more effectively. By combining Naver Cloud's extensive cloud services with Nvidia's cutting-edge GPU capabilities, the partnership is expected to streamline the AI development process, making it more accessible for enterprises looking to innovate. This strategic move comes at a time when demand for AI solutions is surging, with the global AI market projected to reach $190 billion by 2025, according to industry estimates.

In the competitive landscape, this alliance could give Naver Cloud and Nvidia an edge over other cloud service providers and tech giants. Companies like Amazon Web Services and Microsoft Azure have already established significant footholds in the AI sector, making it crucial for Naver and Nvidia to differentiate their offerings. The collaboration is likely to attract businesses seeking advanced AI capabilities, potentially increasing market share for both companies. As noted by [UPI.com](https://news.google.?oc=5&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US%3Aen), this alliance is a strategic response to the growing need for AI-driven solutions across industries.

As the AI landscape continues to evolve, it will be important to monitor how this partnership develops and the specific innovations that emerge from the AI factory alliance.
